source: https://www.evisa.gov.tr/en/info/what-do-i-need-for-my-e-visa-application/, https://www.evisa.gov.tr/en/info/who-is-eligible-for-e-visa/, https://www.evisa.gov.tr/en/tour/thats/, https://www.evisa.gov.tr/assets/files/guide_en.pdf, and https://www.mfa.gov.tr/visa-information-for-foreigners.en.mfa; re-checked 2026-07-14. The official flow first uses nationality, travel-document type, and arrival date to determine visa exemption, direct eligibility, conditional eligibility, or sticker-visa routing. The official group e-Visa guide then documents the applicant, passport, contact, address, and conditional supporting-document fields and publishes exact maximum lengths for those transferred fields. The local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD rather than the guide's compact YYYYMMDD transfer-file format. It uses the guide's published limits where available. The e-Visa flow can vary by nationality, so supporting-document fields are conditional and no local check can decide eligibility or price.

nationality.label: Nationality or region of travel document
nationality.help: Choose the nationality or region of the passport you will carry. The official system uses this answer to check exemption, eligibility, conditions, and price.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the nationality or region of your travel document

travel_document_type.label: Travel document type
travel_document_type.help: Choose the exact document type, usually Ordinary Passport. Diplomatic, service, special, official, and other documents can have different rules.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the exact type printed or assigned to your document

arrival_date.label: Arrival date in Türkiye
arrival_date.help: Enter the planned first arrival date. The e-Visa validity period begins from the date selected in the official application.

errors.invalidFormat: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker

given_names.label: Given or first name(s)
given_names.help: Enter every given name as shown in the passport. The official group guide sets a 50-character maximum including spaces.

errors.required: Given or first name is required
errors.tooShort: Enter the given name shown on the passport

surname.label: Surname(s)
surname.help: Enter the surname exactly as shown in the passport. Leave it blank only when the passport has no surname. The official group guide sets a 50-character maximum.

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Match the passport date. This local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD; the official transfer guide uses YYYYMMDD.

errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be after 2026-07-14

place_of_birth.label: Place of birth
place_of_birth.help: Copy the place of birth from the passport. The official group guide sets a 40-character maximum including spaces.

errors.tooLong: Place of birth cannot exceed 40 characters

mothers_name.label: Mother's name
mothers_name.help: Enter all names when requested. The official group guide allows this field to be blank when the mother's name is not indicated and sets a 40-character maximum.

errors.invalidChars: Use Latin letters, spaces, hyphens, or apostrophes

fathers_name.label: Father's name
fathers_name.help: Enter all names when requested. The official group guide allows this field to be blank when the father's name is not indicated and sets a 40-character maximum.

errors.invalidChars: Use Latin letters, spaces, hyphens, or apostrophes

passport_number.label: Travel document number
passport_number.help: Copy the number exactly from the travel document selected earlier. The official group guide disallows spaces and special characters and sets a 16-character maximum.

errors.tooShort: Enter the number printed on the travel document
errors.tooLong: Travel document number cannot exceed 16 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use capital letters and numbers only, with no spaces
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the document number

passport_issue_date.label: Travel document issue date
passport_issue_date.help: Match the issue date on the travel document. This local checker uses YYYY-MM-DD.

errors.required: Travel document issue date is required

passport_expiry.label: Travel document expiry date
passport_expiry.help: Match the document expiry date. Türkiye generally requires validity at least 60 days beyond the permitted stay, and the official eligibility result can impose more.

errors.required: Travel document expiry date is required

email.label: Email
email.help: Use a lowercase email address you control. The payment link and e-Visa download link are sent by email. The official group guide sets a 40-character maximum.

errors.tooLong: Email cannot exceed 40 characters in the official group guide

phone.label: Phone number
phone.help: Include the country or region code. The official group guide sets a 20-character display maximum; this local checker accepts an international number with 7-15 digits.

errors.invalidFormat: Include the country code and 7-15 digits
errors.tooLong: Phone number cannot exceed 20 displayed characters

home_address.label: Residence address
home_address.help: Enter the applicant's current residence address. The official group guide sets a 200-character maximum including spaces.

supporting_document_type.label: Supporting document type
supporting_document_type.help: Complete this only when the official eligibility result requires a valid visa or residence permit as support. An e-Visa is not available if you do not meet the stated condition.

errors.invalidOption: Choose visa or residence permit only when the official result requires it

supporting_document_issuer.label: Supporting document issuing country or area
supporting_document_issuer.help: Select the country or area that issued the supporting visa or residence permit. Current MFA country rules commonly refer to Schengen, the United States, the United Kingdom, or Ireland, but follow the exact eligibility screen.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the issuer shown on the supporting document

supporting_document_expiry.label: Supporting document expiry date
supporting_document_expiry.help: Enter the expiry date when the supporting document has one. It must remain valid under the conditions shown by the official e-Visa system.

errors.tooEarly: The supporting document is already expired
